description: Composition Grey sweater made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed high neck with a buttoned front, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, rubber print brand collection on the left chest and a ribbed hem Fitting Regular Wash care Hand wash with cold water using a mild detergent Do not soak, hang, twist or wring Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Welcome the winter in style in this sweater from spykar. Stylish to the hilt and snug on the body, this sweater is a great addition to your wardrobe. Layer this over t-shirts or shirts, and jeans. Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 19"
